SEARCH

Uses of Package
io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi

  • Classes in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi used by io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
    Class
    Description
    DefaultFormContext
    Default implementation of FormContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor after all fields of a @FormSpec type have been processed.
    DefaultFormContext.Builder
     
    FieldContext
    Immutable view of a single @FieldMeta-annotated element (field or method) as seen during annotation processing.
    FormContext
    Immutable view of a partially-assembled FormSpec, passed to FormContributor.supports(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and FormContributor.additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).
    SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
    Result of a successful field transformation.
